introSection: Galaxi was a steel roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. It opened in the park's first year, 1975.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster had the larger of the two layouts offered by SDC for their Galaxi roller coasters.

sections.title: Incident
sections.content: A 13-year-old boy suffered head injuries while riding Galaxi on September 11, 1983. The boy was unconscious as the train returned to the station, and he died shortly after. Nobody saw the accident take place. Park officials speculated that he may have stood up and hit his head on a support, which was possible as Galaxi did not have any restraints or seatbelts.

fullText:
Galaxi was a steel roller coaster located at Kings Dominion in Doswell, Virginia, USA. It opened in the park's first year, 1975.

This coaster had the larger of the two layouts offered by SDC for their Galaxi roller coasters.

Black track and red supports.



A 13-year-old boy suffered head injuries while riding Galaxi on September 11, 1983. The boy was unconscious as the train returned to the station, and he died shortly after. Nobody saw the accident take place. Park officials speculated that he may have stood up and hit his head on a support, which was possible as Galaxi did not have any restraints or seatbelts.
